title: No Arrows In You：Respawn
description: Allows you to hide things through configuration
body:
This is a mod ported from [No Arrows In You!](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-arrows-in-you)

This mod was ported from Fabric to Forge.

All original functions are retained and restrictions on the API are removed.

The rendering display of some items can be turned on and off through the Mod configuration interface.
